title: Decorative Terracotta Lattices
description: Add a variety of lattices and decorative terracotta walls, allowing you to create elegant and intricate designs in your buildings.
body:
![terracotta lattices](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57412153dd1d9775494ad1ce5864a952f9ca885d.jpeg)

Transform your Minecraft builds with the Decorative Terracotta Lattice mod, which adds terracotta lattices and walls to create unique and eye-catching designs and add a touch of style to your world with new decorative options.

![terracotta lattices](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ea631196bdeccae8a708e725feb3856cd4d0651.png)

![wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fe74555a121521a1e566dacad009d2ddeba5211.jpeg)

**CRAFTING**

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/726cdb7166ccdc069470224abaa3aa746f09783a.jpeg)
